title: Handoffs in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger handoffs in practice judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Handoffs in Practice is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Handoffs in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good handoffs in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Handoffs in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
